title: Beehiiv vs ActiveCampaign (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and ActiveCampaign. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool fits your needs best.
intro: Beehiiv and ActiveCampaign serve different segments of the email marketing market. Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators and media operators, while ActiveCampaign caters to businesses seeking comprehensive automation and CRM capabilities. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize newsletter growth and monetization or advanced marketing automation.
choose_a_if: You run a newsletter and want to monetize it through ads or subscriptions
You're just starting out and need a free tier to test email marketing
You need built-in analytics and audience segmentation for newsletters
choose_b_if: You need advanced marketing automation and workflow capabilities
You want integrated CRM functionality to manage customer relationships
You're an ecommerce business requiring SMS, lead scoring, and site tracking

faq.a: Neither is universally better—they serve different purposes. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators seeking growth and monetization tools, while ActiveCampaign is superior for businesses needing enterprise-level automation and CRM features. Your choice should align with your primary use case.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper upfront since it offers a free tier for up to 2,500 subscribers. ActiveCampaign has no free option and starts at $15/month. However, Beehiiv's paid plans start at $39/month, so ActiveCampaign becomes competitive for small teams needing automation.

faq.q: Can I switch from ActiveCampaign to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export and import. However, ActiveCampaign's advanced automation workflows and CRM data may not fully transfer to Beehiiv, which is newsletter-focused. Plan your migration carefully and contact both support teams for detailed guidance.
